evals.prompt: I'm upgrading my Flutter MatrixScan app from Scandit SDK v6 to v7. My code still uses the old BarcodeTracking API. Here's the screen: LegacyTrackingScreen.dart. Apply the v6->v7 changes.
evals.expected_output: The skill reads migration.md and applies the v6->v7 rename: every BarcodeTracking* symbol becomes its BarcodeBatch* equivalent (BarcodeTracking->BarcodeBatch, BarcodeTrackingSettings->BarcodeBatchSettings, BarcodeTrackingSession->BarcodeBatchSession, BarcodeTrackingListener->BarcodeBatchListener, BarcodeTrackingBasicOverlay->BarcodeBatchBasicOverlay, BarcodeTrackingBasicOverlayStyle->BarcodeBatchBasicOverlayStyle), and the import barrel changes from scandit_flutter_datacapture_barcode_tracking to scandit_flutter_datacapture_barcode_batch. The BarcodeTracking.forContext factory may stay as BarcodeBatch.forContext for a 6->7 migration. The scanResults dedup list and camera lifecycle are preserved. Provides the 6->7 migration guide URL and a summary.

assertions.text: In the migrated code blocks, no BarcodeTracking-named identifier remains (BarcodeTracking, BarcodeTrackingSettings, BarcodeTrackingSession, BarcodeTrackingListener, BarcodeTrackingBasicOverlay are all renamed)
BarcodeBatch is present in the migrated code
BarcodeBatchSettings is present in the migrated code
BarcodeBatchSession is present in the migrated code
BarcodeBatchListener is implemented in the migrated code
BarcodeBatchBasicOverlay is present in the migrated code
BarcodeBatchBasicOverlayStyle.frame is present in the migrated code
The import barrel scandit_flutter_datacapture_barcode_tracking is replaced by scandit_flutter_datacapture_barcode_batch in the migrated code blocks
The scanResults list and its deduplication logic (contains check before add) are preserved (semantic)
The camera lifecycle (switchToDesiredState and didChangeAppLifecycleState) is preserved (semantic)
The v6->7 migration guide URL https://docs.scandit.com/sdks/flutter/migrate-6-to-7/ is provided
A summary of the changes made is shown

evals.prompt: We're moving our Flutter MatrixScan app from Scandit SDK 7 to 8. Here's our screen, which still uses the BarcodeTracking.forContext factory: LegacyTrackingScreen.dart. Make all the changes needed for v8.
evals.expected_output: The skill applies both the BarcodeTracking->BarcodeBatch rename and the v7->v8 constructor change: BarcodeTracking.forContext(context, settings) becomes BarcodeBatch(settings) followed by dataCaptureContext.setMode(barcodeBatch). The v6 hand-rolled CameraSettings()..preferredResolution is replaced by BarcodeBatch.createRecommendedCameraSettings(). The import barrel becomes scandit_flutter_datacapture_barcode_batch. DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey is left as-is (still valid on Flutter v8). The scanResults dedup and lifecycle are preserved. Provides the 7->8 migration guide URL and a summary mentioning flutter pub get.

assertions.text: BarcodeBatch( captureSettings ) constructor form is present in the migrated code
In the migrated code blocks, the BarcodeTracking.forContext factory is NOT used to construct the mode
dataCaptureContext.setMode( or _context.setMode( is called to register the BarcodeBatch mode
BarcodeBatch.createRecommendedCameraSettings() is used as a static method to obtain the camera settings
In the migrated code blocks, the hand-rolled CameraSettings()..preferredResolution = VideoResolution.uhd4k is removed
In the migrated code blocks, no BarcodeTracking-named identifier remains
The import barrel scandit_flutter_datacapture_barcode_tracking is replaced by scandit_flutter_datacapture_barcode_batch in the migrated code blocks
DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey( is preserved (still valid on Flutter v8) (semantic)
The scanResults list and its deduplication logic are preserved (semantic)
The v7->8 migration guide URL https://docs.scandit.com/sdks/flutter/migrate-7-to-8/ is provided
The summary mentions running flutter pub get after bumping the package version
